rag_rules: Generate assume/guarantee clauses using valid AGREE syntax with labeled expressions
Place type-scope contracts in component type annexes with visible feature references
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in dependency guarantees
Encode bounded output behavior with clamping logic and limit flags
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Declare constants and equations with correct scalar types (int, real, bool)
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent ports in type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
